summary: Materials Baseline + Request Matching Backend - All 19 tests passed. Phase 1 (Planned Materials Snapshot), Phase 2 (Coverage), and Phase 4 (Project Summary) endpoints fully operational.
seed_data_creation: Generated planned materials for offer OFF-0102 with 15% waste. Test regeneration verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Materials Baseline endpoints tested. Project PRJ-001 has 2 planned material rows (3162.5 EUR planned value). Coverage shows 0 fully requested. Summary shows purchased_value=1241 EUR, issued_value=43.2 EUR. All variance calculations working correctly.

P1: POST /api/planned-materials/from-off.notes: Creates planned material rows from offer lines with waste_percent calculation

P1: Duplicate protection returns 400 on.notes: Returns 400 with 'already exist' message when called twice

P1: DELETE /api/planned-materials/by-off.notes: Deletes all planned materials for offer, enabling regeneration

P1: GET /api/planned-materials?project_i.notes: Returns list with all required fields including waste calculations

P2: GET /api/planned-materials/coverage/.notes: Returns project_id, rows array, and summary object

P2: Coverage summary shows fully_request.notes: Summary includes all required count fields

P2: remaining_to_request and remaining_t.notes: remaining_to_request = max(0, planned_qty - requested_qty), remaining_to_purchase = max(0, requested_qty - purchased_qty)

P4: GET /api/project-material-summary/{i.notes: Returns comprehensive summary with project info, planned, actual, variance, metrics_available

P4: metrics_available flags show data so.notes: All 4 flags present: planned_materials=true, purchases=true, warehouse_issues=true, warehouse_returns=true

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
